themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Saul's fear response marks his complete spiritual collapse. The Hebrew 'wayyir'a... wayyecher...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּרָ֥א: afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
